taxonomy: Paratropia scandens is a species of tarantula that belongs to the family Theraphosidae. It is a type of spider and as such, it is classified within the order Araneomorphae and the class Arachnida. Furthermore, it is placed within the infraorder Mygalomorphae. The infraorder Mygalomorphae is a group of spiders that also includes funnel-web spiders and huntsmen. This classification helps to understand the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of Paratropia scandens within the arachnid group.
